curatedPrompt.directive: Solve the following question.  Which player scored the first goal?
curatedPrompt.context: This is in the context of a soccer sports match.
curatedPrompt.outputFormat: Use a plain text list. Format the output as first name, last name, team, position, period, match time in hours:mins:secs.
curatedPrompt.examples: 'Fred Bloggs; Manchester United; Centre Forward; 1st half, 1:15:30
curatedPrompt.assistantFeedback: Feed back all the reasoning used to obtain a result
